answer: The top 5 outliers in Dallas Police active calls this year are: "7XF - Major Accident Freeway" with 13 calls, "6X - Major Disturbance (Violence)" with 11 calls, "46 - CIT" with 10 calls, "DAEF - Dist Armed Encounter Foot" with 6 calls, and "40 - Other" with 5 calls. These represent the most frequently reported call types in the dataset.
